title: One Prompt. One Hour. One Website.
description: How I built my entire portfolio website in under an hour using AI - and why this changes everything for non-technical founders.
content:
Last in November 2024, I joined Nippon IT Systems, and since then, I have been working as a software engineer, which was completely new to me. Prior to joining the company, I had been managing software development teams. I did not write code in my day-to-day work. Our company offers a SaaS product, and my role involves maintaining code and adding new features. We use PHP (specifically CakePHP framework).

During my years at engineering school and while managing software development teams, I acquired knowledge of how software works and became quite comfortable reading lines of code if I needed to understand a feature, etc.

After spending more than a year writing lines of code every day, I have gained more experience, and I wanted to build my own project from scratch so I can gain a deep understanding of main components of a web application (Authentication, Database, API, Routing, Payment, etc).

On November 18, 2025, Google released an AI tool called Antigravity IDE. Using Antigravity is like having a developer on call — you describe what you want, and it builds it for you.

Since Google is offering a one-month free trial, I decided to test it and to create my portfolio site: adusingi.com

My Step-by-Step Process

Here are the steps I followed, and these are the same steps I used for all my projects:

  1. I opened Google's AI Studio. (I sometimes use Lovable, v0, Replit)
  2. I typed one request prompt: "Build me a minimalist portfolio website" + pasted my LinkedIn bio
  3. The AI generated all the code
  4. I connected to my GitHub account
  5. I uploaded it to a free hosting service. For this project, I used Vercel, but I sometimes use Netlify or OVH
  6. I connected my domain name: adusingi.com

The Result

After less than an hour, I got the first version for $0 Cost (Only the domain name costs $13.99).

Since then, I've added a blog and newsletter signup — same process, just describing what I want to my AI assistant.

Why This Matters

A few years ago, this would have meant hiring someone or learning to code yourself. Now, anyone can have a professional online presence built in an afternoon.

You don't need to understand technical details. You just need to know what you want.

Ready to Build Your Own?

I'm working with a small group of professionals to do exactly that—no coding or tech background needed. Just fill out the form below.

👉 Book a 1-to-1 Video Call

https://www.adusingi.com/ai-1on1.html

This article was originally published on LinkedIn and adapted for this blog.
